# 1stStep.ai

1stStep.ai builds practical apps, websites, MVPs, dashboards, internal tools, and workflow automations for founders, small businesses, and professionals.

Primary positioning: turn an app idea or messy business workflow into the right first version before overspending on the wrong build.

Primary conversion path:
- Website: https://www.1ststep.ai/
- Free App Idea Checker: https://www.1ststep.ai/app-idea-viability-checker.html
- App builds: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/app-builds.html
- MVP builds: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/mvp-builds.html
- Websites and lead systems: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/websites.html
- Internal tools and automations: https://www.1ststep.ai/services/internal-tools.html

Core services:
- App and MVP builds
- Website and lead capture systems
- Internal dashboards
- Workflow automation
- SaaS and customer portal first versions
- Build strategy and MVP scope control

Important product:
- The App Idea Viability Checker gives prospects a first-pass MVP readiness score, recommended build path, risk breakdown, and next-step recommendation.

Separate products:
- https://resume.1ststep.ai/ is the AI Resume Builder landing page.
- https://app.1ststep.ai/ is the AI Resume Builder web app.

Business rules:
- 1stStep.ai does not guarantee revenue, rankings, funding, or app success.
- 1stStep.ai focuses on practical first versions, not bloated full builds.
- GitHub repo creation for client projects is locked until proposal acceptance and deposit/payment.
